zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Wattys於大約1433年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可奧斯比 聖 瑪格麗特時，他的父親Richard Watts16歲，母親Isabel Strafford23歲。他和Lady Alice de Beby至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1472年在他的家鄉享年41歲。

nameMeanings.name: Wattys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall): from a pet form of the personal name Wat, a short form of the personal name Walter . Compare Scottish Wattie .

variants.name: Walter
meanings: English (of Norman origin), German, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, and Danish: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This personal name was introduced into England both in the reign of Edward the Confessor and by the Normans (in the forms Walt(i)er, Waut(i)er). After the Norman Conquest it soon became one of the most popular personal names in Britain. Compare Walther .
Germanized or Americanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Valter and Czech Valtr: from the personal name Valter, Valtr, of ancient Germanic origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Wattys was born about 1433, in Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Watts, was 16 and his mother, Isabel Strafford, was 23. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Lady Alice de Beby. He died about 1472, in his hometown, at the age of 41.

fr.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Wattys est né environ 1433, à Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Watts, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Isabel Strafford, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Lady Alice de Beby. Il est décédé environ 1472, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans.

ko.Ormesby Saint Margaret, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Wattys(이)가 대략 1433년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 세인트 마거릿에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Watts(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Strafford(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Lady Alice de Beby(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1472년 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.
